personalInfo.name: Subhash Mahimaluri
personalInfo.title: Full Stack Engineer & AI Solutions Architect
personalInfo.summary: Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web applications and AI-driven solutions. Expert in React, Next.js, and Node.js.

highlights: Led the migration of a legacy monolithic application to a modern **Next.js** microservices architecture, improving performance by 40%.
Architected and implemented a real-time data visualization dashboard using **Socket.io** and **D3.js**.
Mentored a team of 5 junior developers and established coding standards and CI/CD best practices.
Developed and maintained core features of a high-traffic e-commerce platform using **React** and **Redux**.
Optimized database queries in **PostgreSQL**, reducing page load times by 25%.
Integrated third-party payment gateways including Stripe and Razorpay.
Built responsive user interfaces for various client projects using **HTML5**, **CSS3**, and **JavaScript**.
Assisted in the development of RESTful APIs using **Node.js** and **Express**.
Gained hands-on experience with **Git** version control and Agile methodologies.
